title: Provide backup and history
description: On each write, copy the existing JSON file to a backup folder with a timestamped filename. Optionally keep a limited number of backups to avoid disk bloat.
result:
The current JSON data file (`data.json`) was successfully copied to the backup directory with a timestamped filename.  
Backup created: `backups/data_2026-03-06_12-00-00.json`  
The backup routine also checked the backup folder and retained only the most recent 5 backups, deleting any older ones to prevent disk bloat.
